summary: This is a deprecated stub page that redirects readers to newer content. Martin Fowler indicates he no longer considers this page on functional staff organization to be useful. He directs readers to his BusinessCapabilityCentric page for better coverage of the topic. The original content has been entirely replaced with this deprecation notice.
key_points: The author actively maintains and updates his content, deprecating outdated material
Functional staff organization concepts have evolved into business capability centric thinking
Fowler prioritizes directing readers to his best current thinking rather than preserving historical posts
money_quotes: This page is now deprecated as I no longer consider it a useful source of information.
key_insight: Good technical writers maintain their content over time, deprecating outdated ideas and redirecting readers to evolved thinking.
